Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Let's begin air operations with our carrier. One of the first things carriers will have to do to launch aircraft is get up to 20 knots speed. This is done automatically when an aircraft is cued up for launch.
Keep in mind, if you have escorts or auxiliaries in formation with your carrier, they may not be able to keep up with the carrier when it is conducting air ops!
